title: Rethinked Vanilla
description: Vanilla reimagined in a cozy and relaxing way, but also full of adventures and new challanges.
body:
# Rethinked Vanilla - Minecraft reimagined to show it's true potential
### Some of the features of this modpack include
- Balanced crafting
- New structures
- Overhauled villages
- Variation to all items using wood
- Dynamic seasons
- More realism
- Immersive gameplay
- More building blocks (Including vertical slabs)
- Better fishing
## Recommendations
### Shader:
- Pastel Shaders
### All resourcepacks except:
- Elytra Trims Legacy
- Programmer Art
- PACP (Programmer Art Continuation Program)
- Glissando 32x
- High Contrast
